prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: Nested boxes like Russian nesting dolls or organizational containers. The outermost box (large, blue border) is labeled "describe('Calculator')". Inside it, two medium boxes: left one (green border) labeled "describe('add')" containing three small cards labeled "it('adds two numbers')", "it('handles negatives')", "it('handles zero')". Right one (orange border) labeled "describe('subtract')" containing two similar small "it" cards. Each "it" card has a tiny checkbox. A "beforeEach" setup card spans across the top of the outer container. The nesting is clear and visually organized, like a filing system.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
